question: Which text string appears on the man's sweatshirt logo? A. www.1aauto.com B. 1A AUTO C. Toll Free D. Espanol

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short brown hair wearing a blue sweatshirt sits in the driver's seat of a red convertible car. The vehicle features a cream-colored leather interior with ribbed seats and chrome trim. He speaks while gesturing with his right hand inside a garage setting containing shelves of boxes and a wooden workbench. A text overlay displaying the website URL and logo appears in the top right corner.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a blue screen shows the 1A Auto logo and phone numbers; at 6s, the view changes to a man in a blue sweatshirt inside a red convertible; at 8s, the man gestures with his right hand while talking to the camera; at 14s, shelves filled with boxes are visible in the garage background behind the car.
